title: Provider Build Manifest
description: Self-attesting manifest emitted by the Qlib provider builder at publish time. Lives at data/qlib_data/metadata/provider_build.json on each host (the qlib_data tree itself is gitignored). Every formal backtest, validation run, and registry publication MUST record provider_build_id taken from this file. Plan PR 1.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this manifest file. Increment whenever required fields change.

provider_build_id.description: Stable identifier for this published provider build. Recommended form: 'prod_<mode>_<yyyymmdd>_<short-purpose>'. Recorded into every formal artifact for reproducibility.

provider_published_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this provider was atomically published into data/qlib_data/. For retroactive manifests this is the historical publication date.

downstream_revalidated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when downstream revalidation (factor screens, tests) completed against this provider. Distinct from provider_published_at so research can cite either the build or the revalidation date explicitly.

source_git_commit.description: Git SHA of the source tree that built this provider. Null when the build predates the manifest contract (retroactive manifest).

calendar_policy_id.description: Identifier of the calendar policy under which this provider was built (see config/calendar_policies/*.yaml). Formal runs cross-check this against their own --calendar-policy argument.

canonical_kline_hash.description: Tamper-evidence hash over a small fixed set of (instrument, date, field) sentinel readings. Lets formal runs detect that the provider has been replaced or corrupted since publication.

retroactive_manifest.description: True when this manifest was emitted AFTER the original publication rather than during it. Indicates the attestation is post-hoc.

retroactive_manifest_evidence.description: When retroactive_manifest is true, list the evidence sources (e.g., 'README status snapshot', 'project_state downstream revalidation note', 'tests/data_infra/test_event_like_daily_namespace.py output', 'provider field inventory hash'). Required when retroactive_manifest is true.

raw_input_manifest_root.description: Phase 5-B (calendar unfreeze, B3.2): sha256 root of the full-readset raw-input manifest the staged build consumed (workspace/outputs/calendar_unfreeze/raw_input_manifest.json sidecar carries the per-file hashes). Binds provider_build_id -> the attested raw cut. OPTIONAL: pre-thaw builds lack it and must keep loading; presence for formal runs is enforced by the release gate when the calendar policy sets require_raw_input_attestation.

parent_provider_build_id.description: Phase 5-B: the provider_build_id this build was verified against and atomically replaced (the monthly bump's parent compare-and-swap anchor). OPTIONAL for pre-thaw builds.
